steps.title: Read from the line of best fit
steps.content: The question asks for the predicted density at $x=1.2$, so use the line of best fit, not one of the scatterplot dots. At $x=1.2$, the line is between $4.5$ and $4.75$ grams per cubic centimeter.

steps.title: Match the closest choice
steps.content: The value read from the line is about $4.6$. Among the choices, $4.6$ is the only value in that range.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The closest listed value is $4.6$, so C is correct.
